title: BIG4 Gold Coast Holiday Park
description: Modern quarters in a casual resort offering a water park, a cafe & an off-leash dog park.
address: 66-86 Siganto Dr, Helensvale QLD 4212, Australia
hotelDescription:
Off the M1 motorway and surrounded by gardens, this relaxed resort is 2 km from Wet'n'Wild Gold Coast water park and 5 km from Dreamworld amusement park.
 Modern rooms feature kitchenettes, Wi-Fi and TVs. Cabins offer kitchens, TVs/DVD players and verandas; upgraded cabins, bungalows and villas add sitting areas or living rooms. Some quarters come with bunk beds.
 Amenities include a heated water park, an outdoor heated pool with shaded cabanas, in addition to a poolside cafe and a terrace. There's also a camp kitchen, a BBQ area and laundry facilities, plus an off-leash dog park.

title: Main Beach Tourist Park
address: unit 495/3600 Main Beach Parade, Main Beach QLD 4217, Australia

title: Broadwater Tourist Park
description: Streamlined villas on a modest seafront property offering beach access, 2 pools & a boat ramp.
address: 169 Marine Parade, Southport QLD 4215, Australia
hotelDescription:
Set on landscaped gardens along the shores of the Coral Sea, this low-key resort is 6 km from the Sea World Gold Coast marine animal park, 5 km from the Harbour Town shopping and entertainment complex, and 10 km from the M1 motorway.
 Streamlined 1- to 3-bedroom villas feature bold artwork, and come with flat-screen TVs, living rooms and kitchenettes, plus verandahs with BBQs. Upgraded villas are situated on the waterfront.
 Amenities include 2 outdoor pools, a playground, a boat ramp and a game room, as well as a tennis court, BBQs and beach access. There's also a caravan/camp site with a communal kitchen.

title: Burleigh Heads caravan park
address: 10 Cotton St, Burleigh Heads QLD 4220, Australia

title: Ocean Beach Tourist Park
address: 22 Hythe St, Miami QLD 4220, Australia

title: Burleigh Beach Tourist Park
description: Casual villas with kitchens in a relaxed lodging featuring a picnic area & BBQ grills.
address: 36 Goodwin Terrace, Burleigh Heads QLD 4220, Australia
hotelDescription:
Across the street from Burleigh Beach, this relaxed property with modern villas is an 11-minute walk from Burleigh Head National Park and a 13-minute walk from the Jellurgal Cultural Centre.
 Casual 2-story villas have kitchens and separate living areas, along with free Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs and BBQs.
 Amenities include a communal kitchen, a playground, and a picnic area with BBQ grills. Campsites for tents and RVs are available.

title: NRMA Treasure Island Holiday Resort, Gold Coast
description: Laid-back property offering outdoor pools, mini-golf & sports courts, plus a restaurant & BBQs.
address: 117 Brisbane Rd, Biggera Waters QLD 4216, Australia
hotelDescription:
Set 1 km from Harbour Town shopping mall, this laid-back resort is 5 km from Southport Broadwater Parklands and 9 km from Sea World theme park.
 Simple cabins offer Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs and kitchenettes, plus terraces. Relaxed studio to 3-bedroom cottages add living areas, BBQs and/or whirlpool baths.
 There's a bar, and a casual restaurant with a terrace. Other amenities include 4 outdoor pools (1 with a water park), sports courts and a gym, as well as BBQ areas, mini-golf and a kids' play area. Breakfast is available, as are RV- and campsites.

title: Tallebudgera Creek Tourist Park
address: 1544 Gold Coast Hwy, Palm Beach QLD 4221, Australia

title: Kirra Beach Tourist Park
address: 10 Charlotte St, Coolangatta QLD 4225, Australia

title: Nobby Beach Holiday Village
description: Low-key resort offering simple quarters, plus 2 outdoor pools, a kids' play area & BBQs.
address: 2200 Gold Coast Hwy, Miami QLD 4220, Australia
hotelDescription:
Off the Gold Coast Highway, this low-key resort is a 10-minute walk from Nobby Beach on the Pacific Ocean and 12 km from Sea World amusement park.
 Unassuming studio cabins, some with en suite bathrooms, feature kitchenettes and free Wi-Fi. The 2-to 4-bedroom cottages add flat-screen TVs, covered patios and full kitchens with dining areas.
 Parking is free. There are also 2 outdoor pools (1 with a water slide). Other amenities include a BBQ area and a kids' playground, plus a coin-operated laundry and a convenience store. Camping and RV sites are also available.

title: Southport Tourist Park
description: Laid-back property with cabins & apartments, plus an outdoor pool, a hot tub & a playground.
address: 6 Frank St, Labrador QLD 4215, Australia
hotelDescription:
With a variety of accommodation, this low-key resort is 6 km from Sea World Gold Coast and 7 km from the SkyPoint Observation Deck.
 Modest cabins have kitchenettes, bunk beds and shared bathrooms. Upgraded cabins have private bathrooms, additional bedrooms, separate living areas and sofabeds, plus kitchens and covered patios. Informal apartments have 1 or 2 stories, and upgraded options include balconies and washing machines. There's also a 5-bedroom house. Linens may not be provided.
 Amenities include an outdoor pool, a hot tub and a covered BBQ area, plus a campsite, a playground and laundry facilities. Minimum-stay rules may apply.

title: Fairfield by Marriott Inn & Suites Virgin Zion National Park
description: Relaxed hotel with complimentary breakfast, plus a gym, outdoor pools & Zion National Park views.
address: One S Camino Del Rio, Virgin, UT 84779
hotelDescription:
Along State Route 9, this informal hotel with views of rock formations is 5 minutes' walk from the Virgin River and 13 miles from Zion National Park.
 Warmly decorated rooms provide Wi-Fi access and flat-screen TVs, as well as minifridges, microwaves, and tea and coffeemakers. Upgraded rooms add balconies, terraces and/or views of the national park. Suites have sofabeds.
 Parking is free, as is a breakfast buffet served in an unassuming dining room. An outdoor pool and a sundeck offer views of rock formations. There's also a kids' pool and a hot tub. Other amenities include a lounge and a 24-hour gym.

hotelAds.title: Fairfield by Marriott Inn & Suites Virgin Zion National Park

title: Gold Coast Hotel and Casino
description: Polished casino hotel offering eclectic dining, plus bowling, entertainment & a pool.
address: 4000 W Flamingo Rd, Las Vegas, NV 89103
hotelDescription:
This polished casino hotel is 1 mile from the Strip and Chinatown.
 Straightforward, modern rooms come with limited free Wi-Fi, 39-inch flat-screen TVs and coffeemakers. Suites have upscale, traditional furnishings, and add minifridges and living areas. Room service is available.
 A resort fee is charged. In addition to a bustling casino, amenities include an outdoor pool, a 70-lane bowling alley, shuttle service to the Strip, and a showroom with live entertainment. Dining options include a sophisticated steak and seafood restaurant, as well as a buffet-style eatery, a casual noodle bar and a family-friendly American restaurant.

title: Gold Coast Railroad Museum
description: Indoor/outdoor museum of historical train cars, offering tours of the old-fashioned interiors.
